channel.title: Policy & Security Think Tank Updates
channel.description: Custom RSS feed from CSIS, CFR, and other policy institutions

item.title: States Weekly: April 29, 2026
item.description: This edition of States Weekly covers April 29, 2026.

item.title: Orbits of Influence: Emerging Threats to U.S. Space Security and Foreign Policy Implications
item.description: U.S. space dominance is eroding as adversaries deploy counterspace weapons, commercial competition accelerates, and China expands global influence. Action is needed to strengthen resilience, leverage diplomacy, and sustain leadership in an increasingly contested domain.

item.title: How Open-Source, Real-Time Data Can Defeat China at the Edge of Its Influence
item.description: Over the last year, CSIS hosted a high-level discussion series called “25 Gamechangers for 2025.” This piece highlights key insights from the talented cadre of thought leaders tasked with adapting U.S. strategy to a new era of strategic competition with China.
